signals.headline: [Context] Will Dogecoin reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026?
signals.raw:
**No definitive answer exists on whether Dogecoin (DOGE) will reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026, as predictions vary widely due to cryptocurrency volatility, with current prices around $0.09–$0.14 and prediction markets assigning 34.7–37.6% probability to "Yes."**[1][2][3]

### Current Price and Status (as of early 2026 data)
DOGE trades near **$0.09–$0.14**, down from late 2025 peaks around $0.15–$0.16, with neutral momentum, balanced on-chain activity (e.g., $78.97M Binance volume), and oversol
